creator: gabor@acm.org
text:
I have an audio CD that gets stuck at a certain location.
I never had any problem with this (rather old) ATAPI CD player.
First X hangs, then I can't even switch consoles (syscons), but
I can still ping the machine and ppp -alias function for a while,
then dies.  I can't telnet or ftp to the box, but the pings keep
on going until I hit the reset button.

Fix: 

Don't play the CD.
How-To-Repeat: Play the same CD.
